title: Dweller T2X2
description: Horror mod about streamer T2X2, which adds his version in the form of Dweller
body:
Mod adding a T2X2 streamer, like a scary Dweller, he hunts exclusively for the player and small villagers...
Has 300 health and a strong attack, so it is worth running away from him, but if he is too close, you will not be able to run away, he will eat you.
![T2X2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8567a58556fd729f194faa5d4ccecb81e605513.jpeg)
